title: How One Brother With Your Number Changes Everything
caption:
You probably have 50 followers and zero brothers.

That's not accountability. That's just a smaller audience.

Brotherhood isn't subscriptions. It's two men who have each other's number, who know each other's real sin, and who actually pick up the call.

"Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16

Tag the brother who'd call you out. If you can't think of one, that's the problem.

#faith #christianmen #brotherhood #accountability #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #scripture #mensministry
